framework.name: Accountability Proportional to Impact Principle
framework.description: The more AI application influences people's behavior and livelihoods, the more care is needed. Oversight, accountability, and enforcement mechanisms required for ethical outcomes, but proportional to stakes.
framework.raw_quote: The more the AI application could influence people's behavior and livelihoods, the more care is needed.

source.title: FIVE AI FAILS (AND HOW WE CAN LEARN FROM THEM) - MITRE.org
